title: [ConstantFolding] Compare a global and an inbounds GEP
author: mwb-cde
description:
An inbounds GEP with constant, non-zero indices can sometimes be compared against the address of a global. Try to use this when constant-folding icmp.

Fixes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/48801

comments.author: github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
